ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Pitcher) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently assigned to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet and inches */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Hitting or pitching hand (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "current_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently on */,
  "drafted_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "drafted_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Year the player became a rookie */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Player's salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_current_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team plays (e.g., MLB, MiLB) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the stadium is located */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "assistant_general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the assistant general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the season (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., Completed, Scheduled) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_length" TEXT /* Length of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "opened_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was opened */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the stadium */,
  "park_factor" TEXT /* Park factor of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves */,
  "complete_games" INTEGER /* Number of complete games */,
  "shutouts" INTEGER /* Number of shutouts */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Total innings pitched */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits allowed */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Total earned runs allowed */,
  "base_hits" INTEGER /* Total base hits allowed */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Total doubles allowed */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Total triples allowed */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Total home runs allowed */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Total walks issued */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Total at-bats faced */,
  "wild_pitches" INTEGER /* Total wild pitches */,
  "hit_batters" INTEGER /* Total hit batters */,
  "balks" INTEGER /* Total balks */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "whip" REAL /* Walks plus hits per inning pitched */,
  "fip" REAL /* Fielding Independent Pitching */,
  "war" REAL /* Wins Above Replacement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_performance" (
  "game_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves */,
  "complete_games" INTEGER /* Number of complete games */,
  "shutouts" INTEGER /* Number of shutouts */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Total innings pitched */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits allowed */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Total earned runs allowed */,
  "base_hits" INTEGER /* Total base hits allowed */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Total doubles allowed */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Total triples allowed */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Total home runs allowed */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Total walks issued */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Total at-bats faced */,
  "wild_pitches" INTEGER /* Total wild pitches */,
  "hit_batters" INTEGER /* Total hit batters */,
  "balks" INTEGER /* Total balks */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "whip" REAL /* Walks plus hits per inning pitched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Coach, Data Analyst, Admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Summary, Comparative, Trend) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return from injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, free agency) */,
  "new_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's new team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_new_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
